title: Oil gains amid signs of stronger demand
section_path: Oil gains amid signs of stronger demand
section_path_text: Oil gains amid signs of stronger demand
summary:
Main
A risk-on tone across markets was sparked by signs of falling inflation and a weaker USD. Renewed supply side issues also supported the gains. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-16 103129.png | assets/2024-05-16_oil-gains-amid-signs-of-stronger-demand_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_e482675a3582.png

Market Commentary
Copper surged to a new record high as investors pile into the metal at the centre of the energy transition.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A risk-on tone across markets was sparked by signs of falling inflation and a weaker USD. Renewed supply side issues also supported the gains.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Copper surged to a new record high as investors pile into the metal at the centre of the energy transition. The rally was triggered earlier in the year when mine closures tightened the market.
